## Question

Describe what you are trying to accomplish and what you need help with.

## AutoClicker Version or Commit

Enter the release version or commit hash you are using.

## Windows Version

Enter your Windows edition and version or build number if known.

## What You Tried

List the settings, documentation, or troubleshooting steps you already tried.

## Additional Context

Add screenshots or other useful details. Remove passwords, tokens, personal data,
and other sensitive information before submitting.
